hero.headline: Your Dream Property on the Costa del Sol
hero.subheadline: Expert guidance, exclusive developments, and a next-generation approach to real estate in Marbella and beyond.

valueProps.title: Why Choose MARBELLASOL?
valueProps.prop1Desc: Our multilingual team serves buyers from across Europe and beyond, with deep local knowledge of the Costa del Sol.
valueProps.prop2Desc: Access off-market listings and pre-launch prices on the most sought-after new developments in the region.
valueProps.prop3Desc: From property search to legal guidance and key handover — we handle every step of your purchase.
valueProps.prop4Desc: Our next-generation platform connects you with the right property and the right agent at the right time.
